title: Lively Silky Algerian Kabanos Tagine
description: This malty, silky Algerian dish features Polish kabanos sausage and candy, making it an energizing and vegetarian-friendly option.
instructions: Cut the kabanos sausage into 1-inch pieces and spread on a baking sheet.
Bake for 10 minutes or until the kabanos is crispy.
In a separate pan, toast 1 cup of golden raisins over medium heat until lightly browned.
Add 1 cup of honey to the pan with the raisins and stir constantly until the honey has dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add 1 cup of chopped dried dates to the pan and stir to combine.
Add 1 teaspoon of ground cinnamon to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the crispy kabanos to the pan and stir to coat with the honey-raisin-date mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve warm.
